title: rosmarinus officinalis var. lavandulaceus
intro: Rosmarinus officinalis var. lavandulaceus, also known as the Spike Rosemary or Lavender Rosemary, is a variant of the Rosmarinus officinalis plant, which is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rosmarinus officinalis var. lavandulaceus include its ability to improve cognitive function, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory issues. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its benefits.
